name: Gingerbread Waffles with Peach Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the baking mix, milk, egg, molasses, sugar, ginger, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. Mix until well combined. Pour about half of the batter into a preheated waffle iron.
3. Cook until the texture of the finished waffle is cake-like; it is not intended to be crisp. Do not overbake, as the waffle will burn.
4. Repeat with the remaining batter.
5. To make Peach Sauce:
- Drain liquid from the peaches into a 4-cup glass measure.
- Stir in cornstarch mixed with lemon juice.
- Heat on medium until the mixture thickens.
- Add peach slices to the sauce and stir gently.
6. Serve the warm waffles topped with the Peach Sauce. Makes about 6 waffles.
